enum_values.name: Linear
enum_values.summary: Linear (or axial) gradient between two points

enum_values.name: Radial
enum_values.summary: Radial (or spherical) gradient using a center point and a radius

enum_values.name: LinearDisabled
enum_values.summary: Disabled linear gradient. Useful for keeping gradient information around, but not having it displayed

enum_values.name: RadialDisabled
enum_values.summary: Disabled radial gradient. Useful for keeping gradient information around, but not having it displayed
